sections.paragraph:
Original: סון סונה סונה

Transliteration: sevênêh sevênâh sevên

Phonetic: sev-ay-nay'

BDB Definition:

Syene = "her veiling (?)"
  1. a town of Egypt on the frontier of Cush or Ethiopia

Origin: of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
